title: Blockxel
description: Every single pixel in every single block, is now another block...
body:
Experience Minecraft like never before, every single pixel is now another block texture (block-within-a-block effect). This pack is 256x256, so don’t use it if your PC can’t handle heavy textures.

Thanks to [Textures Made of Blocks](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/textures-made-of-blocks/) for making this originally

(I made this before I saw this texture pack [Blocks in Blocks Renewed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocks-in-blocks-renewed) so for 1.20-1.21.7 use this)
